name: Weather (Open-Meteo)
description: Full weather suite for any city: current conditions, forecasts up to 16 days, hourly forecasts, air quality & pollen, UV, historical weather since 1940, marine conditions and official weather alerts (Open-Meteo + MeteoAlarm/DWD, free)

credentials_optional.label: Open-Meteo Commercial API Key
credentials_optional.hint: Only needed for commercial use with >10,000 calls/day

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Current weather and daily forecast (1-16 days): temps, feels-like, precipitation, wind & gusts, UV, sunrise/sunset

tools.name: get_hourly_forecast
tools.description: Hour-by-hour forecast (next 48h or a specific date): temp, rain probability, wind, UV, humidity, clouds

tools.name: get_air_quality
tools.description: Air quality (European/US AQI, PM2.5, PM10, ozone, NO2, SO2), UV index and pollen levels (pollen Europe only)

tools.name: get_weather_history
tools.description: Historical daily weather for any date range since 1940 (max 31 days per call)

tools.name: get_marine_weather
tools.description: Sea conditions for coastal locations: wave height/direction/period, sea surface temperature

tools.name: get_weather_alerts
tools.description: Official weather warnings from national weather services (Europe via MeteoAlarm, Germany via DWD)

author: freddy-schuetz
